name: Lvllm
description: LvLLM is a special NUMA extension of vllm that makes full use of CPU and memory resources, reduces GPU memory requirements, and features an efficient GPU parallel and NUMA parallel architecture, supporting hybrid inference for MOE large models.
summaryZh: LvLLM is a special NUMA extension of vllm that makes full use of CPU and memory resources, reduces GPU memory requirements, and features an efficient GPU parallel and NUMA parallel architecture, supporting hybrid inference for MOE large models. 它主要面向代码场景，适合做 AI 编程助手、代码生成或自动修复。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。
